missions.name: Reclaim — Forward Position, Asset 88-Mars
missions.briefing:
Pilot. Forward position on the rock has gone dark. Viroid signature confirmed inside. Objective: descend, neutralize, recover the position. Deploy with F. Standoff distance ninety meters until signature clears. Cohort cannot dispatch hard at this range — that is why you are on contract. Hold the door. Make it ours.

— Sampaio, MMC

missions.name: Field Assay — Cohort Sample Request
missions.briefing: Pilot. Cohort needs field assay on target body. Start terminal. Analyze rocks with SCI tool. Return report. Recover requested sample mass. No speculation, no delay. Make the data usable. — Sampaio, MMC
